detail.subtitle: Topic detail
detail.noCluster: No cluster selected. Go back to the topics list.

title: Topics
subtitle: Read-only view of Kafka topics in the active cluster.

empty.title: No topics yet
empty.description: Create the first Kafka topic for this cluster.

degraded.title: Limited permissions on this cluster
degraded.description: The configured user lacks some Kafka ACLs. Grant at least DESCRIBE on TOPIC:* to see topics here.

delete.confirmDescription: This permanently removes the topic and all its messages. Type the topic name to confirm.
delete.errorTimeout: Listing consumers for this topic took too long. Try again in a moment.

consumers.title: Consumers
consumers.description: Consumer groups currently reading from this topic.

empty.title: No consumers
empty.description: No consumer group is currently reading from this topic.
